evals.name: happy-path-k8s-architecture
evals.prompt: Design a cloud-native architecture for our e-commerce platform on Kubernetes
evals.expected_output: Architecture covering 12-factor assessment, container strategy, K8s topology, service mesh decision, and FinOps plan
expectations: Defines container image and registry strategy

evals.name: edge-case-small-team
evals.prompt: We have 3 developers. Should we use Kubernetes with a service mesh?
evals.expected_output: Recommends managed Kubernetes, skip mesh, use cloud-managed services for small teams
expectations: Defers mesh adoption until team grows

evals.name: happy-path-serverless-decision
evals.prompt: Should we use serverless or containers for our event processing system?
evals.expected_output: Decision matrix comparing serverless vs containers based on traffic pattern, state, cold start tolerance, and cost
expectations: Considers traffic pattern and state requirements

evals.name: false-positive-cicd-pipeline
evals.prompt: Set up a CI/CD pipeline with GitHub Actions and ArgoCD
evals.expected_output: This skill should NOT be triggered; CI/CD pipeline design uses devsecops-architecture skill
expectations: Skill is not invoked for CI/CD-only requests

evals.name: edge-case-monolith-containerization
evals.prompt: We want to containerize our Java monolith and break it into microservices simultaneously
evals.expected_output: Recommends containerizing the monolith first, then decomposing via strangler fig pattern
expectations: Warns against simultaneous containerization and decomposition
